company.zh: 阿波羅電力股份有限公司

desc.zh: 設計並實作 IoT 資料處理管道，引入 Kafka 緩衝層解決尖峰積壓，單機達 200 筆/秒、入庫延遲 1 秒內。建立 FastAPI Manager 支援多租戶自助管理，Schema 隔離同時支撐 10+ 租戶、數十台裝置接入。系統上線後穩定運行 2 週以上
desc.en: Designed and implemented an IoT data pipeline with Kafka buffering, achieving 200 records/sec with under 1s ingestion latency. Built a FastAPI Manager for multi-tenant self-service with schema isolation across 10+ tenants and dozens of devices. Stable in production for 2+ weeks after launch.
